description_long: This is a modern commercial airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily in light gray, accented by orange and blue stripes near the tail. The aircraft features two large underwing engines, swept-back wings with red-tipped winglets, and a T-tail configuration at the rear. The windows are arranged in a single row along the fuselage, indicating a passenger transport role. The nose is rounded and the cockpit windows are sharply defined, giving the front a distinct, aerodynamic appearance. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable and housed within the fuselage or wings.
description: A sleek, light gray commercial airplane with swept-back wings, underwing engines, and a T-tail, accented by orange and blue stripes near the tail.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, red-tipped winglets, and the T-tail configuration.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the underwing engines, cockpit windows, and the orange-blue tail stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the T-tail, twin engines, and the symmetry of the wings and fuselage.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the passenger windows and tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets and moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple front-facing windows.
